1: <!doctype html>
2: <html lang="es">
3: <head>
4:   <meta charset="utf-8" />
5:   <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
6:   <title>Manual de Identidad Visual — Sistema de Componentes</title>
7:   <style>
8:     /* ============================================================
9:        DESIGN TOKENS — do not use any color outside this block
10:        ============================================================ */
11:     :root {
12:       --bg:         #F8FAFC;
13:       --surface:    #FFFFFF;
14:       --fg:         #0F172A;
15:       --muted:      #475569;
16:       --accent:     #2563EB;
17:       --border:     #E2E8F0;
18: 
19:       --space-1: 8px;
20:       --space-2: 16px;
21:       --space-3: 24px;
22:       --space-4: 32px;
23:       --space-5: 40px;
24:       --space-6: 48px;
25:       --space-8: 64px;
26: 
27:       --radius: 8px;
28: 
29:       --font-display: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', system-ui, sans-serif;
30:       --font-body:    -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', system-ui, sans-serif;
31:       --font-mono:    ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace;
32:     }
33: 
34:     /* === Reset === */
35:     *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
36: 
37:     body {
38:       background: var(--bg);
39:       color: var(--muted);
40:       font: 400 16px/1.6 var(--font-body);
41:       -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
42:       -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
43:     }
44: 
45:     /* === Layout === */
46:     .app-shell {
47:       display: flex;
48:       min-height: 100vh;
49:     }
50: 
51:     /* --- Sidebar --- */
52:     .sidebar {
53:       width: 260px;
54:       flex-shrink: 0;
55:       background: var(--surface);
56:       border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
57:       padding: var(--space-4) var(--space-3);
58:       position: sticky;
59:       top: 0;
60:       height: 100vh;
61:       overflow-y: auto;
62:     }
63:     .sidebar h1 {
64:       font-size: 18px;
65:       font-weight: 700;
66:       color: var(--fg);
67:       margin-bottom: var(--space-1);
68:       letter-spacing: -0.01em;
69:     }
70:     .sidebar .sub {
71:       font-size: 12px;
72:       color: var(--muted);
73:       margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
74:       text-transform: uppercase;
75:       letter-spacing: 0.08em;
76:     }
77:     .sidebar nav a {
78:       display: block;
79:       padding: 6px 0;
80:       font-size: 14px;
81:       color: var(--muted);
82:       text-decoration: none;
83:       transition: color 0.15s;
84:     }
85:     .sidebar nav a:hover { color: var(--accent); }
86:     .sidebar nav .nav-label {
87:       font-size: 11px;
88:       text-transform: uppercase;
89:       letter-spacing: 0.1em;
90:       color: var(--muted);
91:       margin-top: var(--space-3);
92:       margin-bottom: var(--space-1);
93:       font-weight: 600;
94:     }
95: 
96:     /* --- Main content --- */
97:     .content {
98:       flex: 1;
99:       min-width: 0;
100:       max-width: 960px;
101:       padding: var(--space-6) var(--space-5);
102:     }
103: 
104:     /* === Typography tokens applied === */
105:     h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {
106:       font-family: var(--font-display);
107:       font-weight: 700;
108:       color: var(--fg);
109:       line-height: 1.25;
110:     }
111:     h1 { font-size: 40px; margin-bottom: var(--space-2); letter-spacing: -0.025em; }

115:     h5 { font-size: 16px; }
116:     h6 { font-size: 14px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; }
117: 
118:     p, li { color: var(--muted); }

<type>file</type>
<content>
1: # Brand spec — Manual de Identidad Visual
2: 
3: Source: User-provided design tokens spec (Tailwind-like CSS). Accent updated from blue-600 to orange-500 (#FF7A05) per later instruction.
4: 
5: ## Color tokens (CSS)
6: 
7: ```css
8: --bg:             #F8FAFC;    /* slate-50   — fondo principal */
9: --surface:        #FFFFFF;    /* white      — tarjetas, modales */
10: --fg:             #0F172A;    /* slate-900  — títulos, texto principal */
11: --muted:          #475569;    /* slate-600  — cuerpo, metadata */
12: --accent:         #FF7A05;    /* orange-500 — acciones, enlaces, hover */
13: --accent-lighter: #FFF0E0;    /* orange-100 — fondos sutiles (hover de navegación, alertas) */
14: --accent-light:   #FFC490;    /* orange-300 — bordes de alerta, variantes outline */
15: --accent-dark:    #E06900;    /* orange-600 — hover de botón primary */
16: --accent-darker:  #A34A00;    /* orange-800 — active states, foco */
17: --border:         #E2E8F0;    /* slate-200  — bordes, separadores */
18: ```
19: 
20: ### Escala completa de acento (orange)
21: 
22: | Shade | Hex       | Uso                            |
23: |-------|-----------|--------------------------------|
24: | 50    | #FFF7ED   | Fondo de página, secciones     |
25: | 100   | #FFEDD5   | Hover sutil, fondos alternos   |
26: | 200   | #FFD6B0   | Bordes decorativos             |
27: | 300   | #FFB875   | Badge outline, hover secundario|
28: | 400   | #FF9633   | Iconos, acentos secundarios    |
29: | **500** | **#FF7A05** | **Acento principal (base)**  |
30: | 600   | #E06900   | Hover botón primary            |
31: | 700   | #C25800   | Active button                  |
32: | 800   | #A34A00   | États focus profundos          |
33: | 900   | #853800   | Máximo contraste sobre fondo   |
34: 
35: ## Font stacks
36: 
37: No typefaces specified → inferred from the design tokens' Tailwind/system aesthetic:
38: 
39: ```
40: --font-display: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', system-ui, sans-serif;
41: --font-body:    -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', system-ui, sans-serif;
42: --font-mono:    ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace;
43: ```
44: 
45: ## Spacing system
46: 
47: All margins/paddings in multiples of 8px (Tailwind scale: p-2 = 8px, p-4 = 16px, p-6 = 24px, p-8 = 32px).
48: 
49: ## Layout rules
50: 
51: - Border radius: 8px (rounded-lg)
52: - Headings: font-weight 700, color = --fg (slate-900)
53: - Body: font-weight 400, color = --muted (slate-600)
54: - Accent budget: one decisive orange presence per component. Never flood both border + background + text with orange simultaneously.

(End of file - total 54 lines)
</content>

content:
Voy a actualizar `index.html` con la paleta naranja `#FF7A05`.Let me verify no blue references remain:`index.html` actualizado con paleta naranja `#FF7A05`:

- **`:root`** — `--accent` → `#FF7A05`, añadidas 4 variantes naranja
- **Color swatch** — acento muestra `#FF7A05 · orange-500`
- **Escala de acento** — reemplazada de azul (50→900) → naranja (50→900)
- **Botones** — hover primary → `#E06900`
- **Formularios** — focus ring → `rgba(255, 122, 5, 0.18)`
- **Navegación** — active background → `var(--accent-lighter)`
- **Alertas** — colores → variantes naranja (lighter/light/dark)
- **Badges** — "Info" → variantes naranja
- **Bloque de código** — tokens actualizados con escala naranja completa
- **React example** — comentario con `#FF7A05`
